I can code in Python. I cannot drive a truck.
She can speak English. He can design dashboards.
Can you build a pipeline? Yes, I can. No, I cannot.
We can troubleshoot the system. They cannot work today.
Hi Danilo! We are building the new project team. What can you do well?
I can code in Python and SQL, and I can build data pipelines.
Great. Can you design the dashboards too?
I can design simple dashboards, but I cannot make beautiful graphics.
That is fine. Can you handle large datasets?
Yes, I can. I handle big datasets every day.
Perfect. And when the system breaks, can you troubleshoot it?
Yes, I can troubleshoot the problem and fix it fast.
Excellent. Can you present the results to the client on Friday?
Yes, I can. I can present our results in a clear way.
I can code in Python and SQL.
I can build data pipelines and design dashboards.
I can handle large datasets and troubleshoot problems.
I cannot make beautiful graphics, but I can present my results.
Can you help me with this? Yes, I can.

Hi Danilo, it's Rachel. Quick update about the new project team. Everyone can do different things. Sofia can code in Python very well, and she can build the data pipeline. Marcus can design the dashboards, but he can't write the database queries yet, so he needs a little help. I can plan the schedule, and I can present our results to the client. You can troubleshoot the system fast, and you can handle big datasets, so you are very important for this team. Can you start on Monday? Let me know. Thanks. Bye!

Let me tell you what I can do at work. I am a data engineer, so I can code in Python, and I can build data pipelines every week. I can design simple dashboards, and I can operate our main system. I can handle large datasets, and when something breaks, I can troubleshoot the problem and fix it fast. I can't design beautiful graphics. That is not my ability. But I can present my results in a clear way. Every month, I learn one new thing that I can do.
